transcription.text: Greenfield Auto Repair, this is Sarah. Yeah, I brought my car in last week for brake pads and now they're squealing worse than before. I'm really frustrated. I'm sorry to hear that. Can you bring it back in so we can take a look? I already took a day off work for this. I shouldn't have to come back. I completely understand. We'll prioritize you first thing tomorrow morning, no charge for the re-inspection. Fine. But if this isn't fixed I'm going somewhere else. We'll make it right, I promise.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Return customer unhappy with brake pad work from last week — still squealing. Offered free re-inspection first thing tomorrow. Customer frustrated but agreed to return.
